title: NIO Statutory Equality and Good Relations Duties Annual Progress Report for 2024/2025
body: "This report presents progress made by the Northern Ireland Office (NIO) during 2024/25 in fulfilling its statutory equality and good relations duties, and implementing Equality Scheme commitments with reference to Section 75 of the NI Act 1998 and Section 49A of the Disability Discrimination Act 1995. "
